'''Ehjenla''' was the small [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Tuhgri]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. It was located within the [[Kathol Outback/Legends|Kathol Outback]], which was part of the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]]. Homeworld of the Tuhgri species, the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] began emerging from an ice age during the last centuries of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The polar ice caps were still large following as of [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] were large and deep, and the fertile plains were rutted with fjords.
